notes: Synthesized from the adaptor surface (put/get/list) and the S3 SDK operations they wrap (PutObject, GetObject, ListObjectsV2). The adaptor uses the AWS JS SDK, not raw REST, so the real S3 REST responses are XML; here responses are modelled as JSON to match the shapes the adaptor exposes on state (parsed body or {base64} for get, ListObjectsV2 Contents for list). Server URL is the generic S3 endpoint; real requests are region/bucket scoped and SigV4-signed.
